sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71815" key="cunwni/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξῡν-ωνία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n71815.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κοινωνία</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">partnership, fellowship,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀλώπηξ καἰετὸς ξυνωνίην ἔμειξαν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0232.tlg001:86" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archil.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">86</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
